---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem / use case**
What are you trying to do that Boo doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it's a new flag or command, sketch the interface.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried or other approaches you weighed.

**Additional context**
Anything else — e.g. whether this relates to a specific runner (kiro/shell) or
platform.
